title: The highest-impact redundancy target is the collab-ops-feed upload
content:
## Ranked targets for `RedundancyLevel` (read-frequency × tail-impact)

| Hot path | Call site | Read frequency | Impact |
|---|---|---|---|
| Collab ops batch | `collab-ops-feed.ts:138` (`uploadFile act:true`) | Every peer ping + every /bzz fetch on ping-miss | **HIGH** — on the 10s critical path |
| Drive share bundle | `lifecycle.ts:169` (`uploadFile act:true`) | Once per accept (cold, urgent) | HIGH — currently retries with 0-2-5s backoff |
| Collab manifest snapshot | `collab-manifest-feed.ts:106` | On accept + every member add/revoke | MEDIUM |
| Drive manifest snapshot | `swarm-client.ts:503` | On recovery + push merges | MEDIUM |
| Chat history page | `chat-history.ts:215` | On open + pagination | LOW |
| Public profile feed | `share-manager.ts:29` | Sporadic peer lookups | LOW-MEDIUM — redundancy helps payload, not feed HEAD |

**Minimal path:** thread `redundancyLevel` through `SwarmClient.uploadFile` / `uploadData` (`swarm-client.ts:212` and `:225-260`), then pass `RedundancyLevel.MEDIUM` at `collab-ops-feed.ts:138` only. Measure before expanding.
description: collab-ops-feed.ts:138 uploadFile is read on every peer ping and every /bzz fetch on ping-miss, sitting directly on the 10s collab critical path — highest read frequency × tail-latency impact.
